_comment: Dwellings the player can rent/buy/sell via the Properties phone app (Step 19.4). 'location' is the enterable scene id (data/locations/<id>.json). 'startsControlled' seeds the player's initial tenure (owned|rented|none). 'photo' is an optional image path; if absent/missing the app draws a placeholder card. Prices: buyPrice (one-time), rentPrice (per rent period), sellValue (cash back when sold).

properties.name: Apt 2B
properties.blurb: A cramped one-room walkup. The radiator clanks all night. It's home — for now.

properties.name: The Loft
properties.blurb: High ceilings, big windows, and floor space for a whole band's worth of gear. The kind of place that makes you feel like you've finally arrived.

properties.name: Warehouse Unit 7
properties.blurb: A raw warehouse unit in the heart of Rocktroit. Loud neighbors who don't mind loud music. A real base in the big city.
